questions.question: What type of insurance would a fire disaster fall under?
My home is burned down and now I need to stay in a hotel. Am I covered?
answers: Yes, your homeowners insurance can cover additional living expenses such as the cost of a hotel stay and food
No, your insurance will cover damages but not hotel costs
Yes, but only if you buy an add-on to your plan
No, but your homeowners insurance will help cover food costs

questions.question: How can you save money on homeowners insurance?
answers: By choosing not to insure applicances
Installing smoke detectors, fire extinguishers and deadbolt locks
Eligibility depends on the material of your house (brick vs wood)

questions.question: What other kinds of insurance fall under Auto-Owners Insurances' Multi-Policy Discount?
What protection does homeowners insurance exclude
answers: Medical Payments to those injured at your residence

questions.question: What additional option for flood coverage can you purchase with homeowners insurance?
answers: Inland Flood Coverage (for those not in or near high-hazard zones)
